Metadata.SourceFile: Java Jim in Square Shaped Trouble.tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1000 "JAVAJIMINSQUARESHAPEDTROUBLE-1000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Java Jim in Square Shaped Trouble.prg"
